cart.emptyMsg: Reba imyambaro igezweho, ibikoresho by'amakuru no kurinda imitungo yawe.
cart.vatNote: Ibiciro birimo TVA. Gutumiza bikorerwa abatwara baho.

wishlist.title: Ibyo wahisemo
wishlist.empty: Nta kintu kirimo mu byo wifuza

home.heroSubtitle: Vumbura isi aho ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga bihebuje bihurira n'imyambaro igezweho ndetse na serivisi zizewe.
home.heroTitleMain: Ahantu Hawe ha Kugura Imyenda n'Ikoranabuhanga.
home.heroSubtitleMain: Reba imyenda myiza, inkweto, imikufe, n'ibikoresho by'umutekano bya CCTV byatoranyijwe neza.
home.featuredDesc: Ibyatoranyijwe byiza mu myenda no mu ikoranabuhanga.
home.bestSellersDesc: Ibyatoranyijwe cyane mu myenda n'ibikoresho by'umutekano.
home.howToShopDesc: Intambwe zoroshye zo kurangiza igura ryawe.

footer.newsletterDesc: Menya ibiganiro bishya no kugura neza mubutumwa bwawe.
footer.tagline: Aha hihebuje aho imyambaro, ikoranabuhanga no serivisi z'injineriya bihurira i Kigali, Rwanda.
footer.address: KN 4 Ave, Kigali City Mall, Priz-de-chaussée, Kigali, Rwanda

checkout.title: Kwishyura neza
checkout.cashDesc: Ishyura mu ntoki nibakugezaho ibicuruzwa. Biri gusa muri Kigali.
checkout.alert: Uzuza imyirondoro yawe n'aho ibicuruzwa bizajya.
checkout.freeShippingMsg: Gura ibindi bya %amount% ubone koherezwa kubuntu
checkout.deliveryLogistics: Aho Ibintu Bizajya & Uburyo bwo Kohereza
checkout.momoPushMsg: Ubutumwa bw'kwishyura buzohererezwa kuri iyi nomero ngo ubyemeze
checkout.cashDesc2: Ishyura mu ntoki tugeze iwawe. Tegura amafaranga neza.
checkout.authMsg: Mu gutanga iyi komande, utanga uburenganzira bwo gutanga ibicuruzwa.

auth.createDesc: Iyandikishe kugira ngo wihutishe kugura no gukurikirana.
auth.quickSandboxDesc: Koresha aya makonte kugira ngo urebe uburyo bw'umuguzi n'ubuyobozi.
auth.name: Izina
auth.noOrdersDesc: Nta fagitire zabonetse kuri konti yawe.

elec-1.name: Kamera ya Hikvision Smart PTZ Wifi yo Kurinda
elec-1.desc: Kamera yo kurinda ihebuje ishobora guhinduruka 360° ifite Wifi yo kurinda inzu cyangwa ibiro byawe mu buryo bwihuta.

elec-2.name: Kamera ya CCTV Dahua Dome Pro
elec-2.desc: Kamera y'umwuga yo kurinda ifite ubushobozi bwo kureba mu mijoro n'amafoto maremare yo gufata ibintu neza.

elec-3.name: Ekuteri za Audio-Technica Pro Studio Zidafite Insinga
elec-3.desc: Ekuteri z'umwuga zidafite insinga zifite urusaku rw'ubwiza rwo kuruhira mu studio cyangwa mu buzima bwa buri munsi.

elec-4.name: Radiyo Nto ya Vintage FM/AM Itwara
elec-4.desc: Radiyo nto yitwara ifite imyambarire ya kera ifite gutwara FM/AM neza kandi igezweho ku bakunda sitayle ya kera.

elec-5.name: Isaha ya Quartz Yoroshye y'Umukara ifite Umubiri wo mu Cyuma
elec-5.desc: Isaha yiza ifite imyambarire yoroshye hamwe n'umubiri wo mu cyuma cy'umukara kandi ikora neza.

clot-1.name: T-Shirt Nini yo mu Ipamba ry'Umuzvvinyo
clot-1.desc: T-shirt yoroshye yo mu ipamba ry'umwimerere ryemejwe hamwe n'imyambarire nini yo mu mujyi.

clot-2.name: Ishati ya Kabuhariwe yo mu Tiri ifite Utubuto
clot-2.desc: Ishati yiza yo mu tiri ry'umwimerere ifite utubuto yose, nziza ku birori byose.

clot-3.name: Ikabuyi ya Chino Slim Fit Irashoboye Kwambukirwa
clot-3.desc: Ikabuyi ya chino ifite imyenda irashoboye kwambukirwa kugira ngo uryohere kandi ugaragare neza.

clot-4.name: Survêtement yo mu Mujyi ya Tech Fleece
clot-4.desc: Imyenda yo mu mujyi ikozwe mu bwoya bwa tekiniki burasa, byakozwe kugira ngo uzafashe sitayle no kuryoherwa mu mukino.

clot-5.name: Ikirezi cy'Umubiri Cyoroshye cy'Umurabyo Wacukuwe
clot-5.desc: Ikirezi cyoroheje cy'umurabyo wacukuwe, kinini ku minsi yo mu mpeshyi no mu myambarire yoroheje.

clot-6.name: Imyenda Yuzuye Yizewe y'Ikiruhuko
clot-6.desc: Imyenda yuzuye yizewe nziza ku kiruhuko, ihuza kuryoherwa na sitayle y'ubu.

clot-7.name: Jersey y'Umupira w'Amaguru ya Retro ku Mukunda
clot-7.desc: Jersey y'umupira w'amaguru ifite sitayle ya kera, nziza ku bashyigikiye n'abakunda gukusanya.

jewel-1.name: Umukufu Woroshye wa Zahabu 18K
jewel-1.desc: Umukufu mwiza ufite sitayle yoroshye hamwe n'umwiza wa zahabu 18K kugira ngo ugaragare neza kandi uhoraho.

foot-1.name: Inkweto za Chelsea zo mu Ruhu rwakozwe n'Umunyamabanga
foot-1.desc: Inkweto za Chelsea zakozwe n'amaboko mu ruhu rwemewe kandi zihoraho kugira ngo uzagaragare neza.

foot-2.name: Inkweto zo Kwiruka zifite Ikirimiro cy'Ikintu
foot-2.desc: Inkweto zo kwiruka zifite sisitemu yo gukingira byoroshye zitagufasha kuryoherwa no gukiranira neza.

about.subtitle: AMATEKA YACU
about.title: Kuri IE & F Company Ltd
about.desc: Turi aba mbere mu guhuza imyenda myiza, ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga bishya, no gushyiraho sisitemu zizewe mu mujyi wa Kigali.
about.historyDesc: Yashinzwe i Kigali, Ian Electronics & Fashion Shop (IE & F SHOP) yavutse ku gitekerezo cyo gukora ahantu hihariye hita ku myambarire no ku ikoranabuhanga. Twatangiye turi iduka rito tuza kuvamo abahanga mu gushyiraho imiyoboro na sisitemu z'umutekano.
about.missionDesc: Intego yacu n'imwe: gutanga imyenda myiza ifasha abantu kwisanzura, no gukora sisitemu z'umutekano, imiyoboro, na porogaramu zizewe zirinda ubuzima n'ubucuruzi.
about.visionDesc: Kuba ikigo cya mbere muri Afurika y'Iburasirazuba gihuza ubucuruzi n'ikoranabuhanga, kizwiho gukoresha ibikoresho by'umwimerere no gukora imishinga myiza.
about.uncompromisingDesc: Muri IE & F SHOP, ntitujya twemera ibintu byoroheje. Buri mupira ukozwe mu ipamba ryiza. Buri kamera y'umutekano iva ku ruganda rukuru kugira ngo ikore neza. Abakozi bacu bafite ibyangombwa byose.
about.member1Bio: Inzobere mu miyoboro, sisitemu z'ubucurabwenge, n'imishinga y'amashanyarazi.
about.member2Bio: Agamije imyenda myiza yakozwe mu ipamba ryiza ry'umwimerere.
about.member3Bio: Agenzura ibisubizo bya porogaramu, urubuga rwa interineti, n'umutekano wa API.

services.subtitle: Ikoranabuhanga & Engineering
services.title: Ikoranabuhanga & Gushyiraho Sisitemu
services.desc: Dufite abahanga bafite ibyangombwa mu gukora no gushyiraho sisitemu. Reba ibyo dukora hano hasi usabe ubufasha.
services.reqSubtitle: Saba ikipe yacu kugufasha cyangwa inama.
services.successMsg: Umwe mu bahanga bacu arakuvugisha mu kanya.
services.bookDesc: Uzuza ubu butumwa usabe igenzura ku murimo wawe.
services.fillFieldsAlert: Uzuza ibyo usabwa byose kugira ngo wohereze ubusabe.

orderConf.title: Komande Yakiriwe Neza!
orderConf.desc1: Igurisha ryawe ryagenze neza. Inyemezabuguzi nomero

contact.subtitle: DUFASHA ABAKIRIYA IGIHE CYOSE
contact.title: Twandikire cyangwa Uduhamagare
contact.desc: Waba wifuza kubaza ku myenda mishya cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha bw'ikoranabuhanga, amakipe yacu yiteguye kugufasha.
contact.name: Amazina
contact.successMsg: Umwe mu bakozi bacu arakuvugisha vuba.
contact.headerDesc: Ukeneye inama ku myenda, ufite ibibazo ku bicuruzwa, cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha bwihuse? Twandikire ako kanya.
contact.successMsgExtended: Urakoze kutwandikira. Umwe mu bahanga bacu arakuvugisha mu masaha 2 y'akazi.

returns.subtitle: Kurengera Umuguzi
returns.title: Gusubiza ibicuruzwa & Kwishyurwa
returns.desc: Soma amabwiriza yumvikana agenga uburyo bwo gusubiza ibicuruzwa, gusubizwa amafaranga, cyangwa kugurana.
returns.card1Desc: Twemera ko umukiriya asubiza igicuruzwa mu minsi 7. Ku bantu bari hanze ya Kigali, igihe ni iminsi 14 uhereye umunsi wakiriyeho igicuruzwa.
returns.cond1: Igicuruzwa kigomba kuba kitarakoreshwa cyangwa ngo cymeswe.
returns.cond2: Kigomba kuba kikiri mu isashi yacyo hamwe na tagi.
returns.cond3: Agakarito k'inkweto ntagomba kuba gacitse cyangwa kanditsweho.
returns.cond4: Kamera z'umutekano ntizigomba kuba zishushanyijeho cyangwa zaciwe insinga.
returns.card2Desc: Niba wakiriye igicuruzwa cyangiritse cyangwa kidakwiriye, turagisimbuza ku buntu. Kugurana imyenda bitewe n'uko idakwiriye biterwa n'ibiri mu bubiko.
returns.specialClauseDesc: Ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga n'insinga ntibishobora gusubizwa niba byaramaze gushyirwaho n'abandi bantu badafite ibyangombwa byacu.
returns.step1Desc: Ikipe yacu isuzuma igicuruzwa kugira ngo irebe niba kimeze neza.
returns.step2Desc: Iyo dusanze ibintu bimeze neza, duhita twemeza ko usubizwa amafaranga cyangwa uhabwa ikindi.
returns.step3Desc: Amafaranga asubizwa binyuze kuri Mobile Money cyangwa Ikarita ya Banki.
returns.specialClauseDesc2: Kamera, DVR, inzitizi z'umuriro, cyangwa router ziramutse zashyizweho n'abakozi ntizishobora gusubizwa.

howtoshop.subtitle: Amabwiriza y'Uko Bikora
howtoshop.title: Uko Uhaha N'Uko Usaba Serivisi
howtoshop.desc: Kurikiza aya mabwiriza kugira ngo ugure imyenda cyangwa usabe abahanga kuza kugukorera iwawe mu mujyi wa Kigali.
howtoshop.s1d: Kanda mu byiciro bine bikuru: imyenda, inkweto, imikufe, n'ibikoresho by'umutekano.
howtoshop.s2d: Reba ubusobanuro bwose, uko kingana, ibara, ndetse niba kigihari mu bubiko.
howtoshop.s3d: Hitamo umubare wifuza, ushobora no kubibika muri wishlist kugira ngo uzabigure nyuma.
howtoshop.s4d: Reba incamake y'ibyo uguze hanyuma ukande ahanditse 'Kwishyura' wuzuze imyirondoro yawe.
howtoshop.s5d: Tanga aderesi yawe yuzuye muri Kigali ndetse na nomero ya telefone yawe kugira ngo tukugeraho.
howtoshop.s6d: Hitamo kwishyura ukoresheje MTN MoMo cyangwa Airtel Money, Ikarita ya banki cyangwa ucashyura tugeze iwawe.
howtoshop.s7d: Ohereza ubusabe bwawe, uhita uhabwa nomero ya fagitire ndetse ukurikirane aho igicuruzwa kigeze.
howtoshop.a1: Kanda kuri 'Services' hejuru ku rubuga. Kanda 'Saba Serivisi' munsi y'icyo ushaka (urugero: Kamera), uzuze imyirondoro yawe umukozi wacu arakuhamagara.
howtoshop.a2: Ikiguzi cyo kohereza ni RWF 5,000 muri Kigali. Ku bantu baguze ibirenze RWF 150,000 boherezwa kubuntu.
howtoshop.a3: Imyenda yacu igendana n'ingano z'uburengerazuba (S, M, L, XL). Ingano zose zanditswe mu bisobanuro by'igicuruzwa. Niba utazi, twandikire cyangwa uze iduka ryacu muri Kigali City Mall.
howtoshop.q4: Gushyiraho sisitemu z'ikoranabuhanga bifata igihe kingana iki?
howtoshop.a4: Gushyiraho kamera 4 bifata umunsi 1 w'akazi. Imiyoboro ya fibre optique cyangwa inzitizi z'umuriro bifata iminsi 2 kugeza 5.

productDetail.reliableShippingDesc: Kohereza vuba mu minsi 1-2 muri Kigali, mu gihugu hose.
productDetail.easyReturnsDesc: Gusubiza mu minsi 7 ku bicuruzwa bidakoreshejwe.

srv-1.title: Gushyiraho Kamera & Umutekano
srv-1.description: Igenzura y'ahantu, gushyiraho kamera, guhindura DVR/NVR, no gukurikirana kuri telefone.
srv-1.d1: Gusuzuma umutekano no gushyiraho kamera neza
srv-1.d2: Gushyiraho kamera za dome, bullet na PTZ n'insinga z'imvura
srv-1.d4: Gushyiraho porogaramu yo gukurikirana kuri telefone
srv-1.d5: Garanti y'umwaka 1 n'ubufasha nyuma yo gushyiraho
srv-1.priceInfo: Guhera kuri RWF 150000 (bitewe n'umubare wa kamera)

srv-2.title: Gushyiraho Sisitemu y'Umuriro
srv-2.description: Gushyiraho inzitizi z'umuriro, alarme, n'ibikoresho byo kuzimya umuriro.
srv-2.d4: Gusuzuma no gutanga icyemezo buri mwaka

srv-3.title: Imiyoboro ya Interineti
srv-3.description: Imiyoboro ya interineti yihuse, fibre optique, Wi-Fi, no gutegura amashini ya server.
srv-3.d1: Gushyiraho insinga za Cat6/Cat7 mu buryo bwiza
srv-3.d2: Gushyiraho router Mesh mu bice byose

srv-4.title: Gushyiraho Amashanyarazi
srv-4.description: Gushyiraho amashanyarazi mu nzu no mu biro, gutunganya insinga, n'urumuri.

srv-5.title: Gukora Porogaramu & Urubuga
srv-5.description: Gukora urubuga rw'ikigo, porogaramu zo kugurisha, n'ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga.
srv-5.d1: Gukora urubuga rwiza rukora kuri telefone
srv-5.d3: Gushyiraho sisitemu yo guhindura ibiri ku rubuga
srv-5.d4: Gukomeza gukurikirana no guteza imbere SEO

rev-1.comment: Gushyiraho kamera ya Dahua na IE & F Shop byagenze neza! Abahanga bacu bashyize kamera neza. Nshobora kureba ubwoko bwanjye kuri telefone mu buryo bwa HD.

rev-2.comment: Imyenda n'amasaha y'ubwiza buke ari byiza cyane. T-shirt zikomeye kandi zifite ubuziranenge. Kohereza byihuse cyane. Birashimishije!

rev-3.comment: Twabashije gukora imiyoboro y'ibiro byacu bishya. Abahanga b'ukuri. Bashyize insinga mu buryo bwiza bafite ibimenyetso bisobanutse.

step1.title: Reba & Hitamo
step1.description: Reba ibyiciro byacu by'imyenda, inkweto, imikufe, cyangwa ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga.

step2.title: Reba Amakuru
step2.description: Reba ingano, ibisobanuro by'ikoranabuhanga, n'ibyo biri mu bubiko.

step3.title: Shyira mu Gitebo
step3.description: Shyira ibicuruzwa mu gitebo cyawe cyangwa ubibike mu wishlist.

step4.title: Kwishyura Byizewe
step4.description: Uzuza aho bizajya ukoresheje Mobile Money, ikarita, cyangwa cash.
